purpose: XHTML shell for the original Portal "Still Alive" end credits recreation. It declares the lyric, credit, and picture containers that portal/cake.js fills at runtime, loads style.css, cakedata.js, and cake.js in that order, and now includes a fullscreen #splash overlay that gates the credits sequence behind a user click/keypress to satisfy modern autoplay policy.
invariants: cakedata.js must load before cake.js because cake.js reads global asciiart, credits, and lyrics.
The lyrics, credits, and picture container ids are runtime API for portal/cake.js and portal/style.css.
The #splash element with id 'splash' is the autoplay-policy gate; portal/cake.js queries it on DOMContentLoaded and dismisses it on click or Space.
gotchas: The page uses XHTML 1.0 Strict-era markup and no viewport meta; layout behavior is intentionally old and fixed-size.
Splash overlay styles are inline in <head>; removing the inline <style> block breaks the splash gate visually.
